title: AIRAJ Telescopic Lopper 42-61cm, Loppers for Gardening with 3.5cm Cutting Capacity,Tree Loppers Heavy Duty,Bypass Garden Lopper for Pruning Dry and Wet Branches
features: 【Extendable Durable Handle】The tree lopper handle extends freely from 42cm to 61cm, enabling flexible access to both high branches and low shrubs. The robust iron arm combines high-quality Q195 material with a plastic spray coating for exceptional strength, preventing bending when cutting thick branches. The dual-colour PVC-coated handle offers comfortable, non-slip grip, ensuring secure control even with sweaty palms for enhanced operational safety.

【High-Hardness Sharp Blade】The bypass loppes blade head utilises premium steel, combining the sharpness of SK5 steel with the toughness of S50C steel. HRC48-52 heat treatment and a Teflon coating ensure clean cuts, wear resistance, and rust prevention. Maintains sharpness even with frequent, long-term use, effortlessly cutting branches up to 3.5cm in diameter, wet or dry, for sustained cutting efficiency.

【Fatigue-Resistant Design】The Tree Loppers Ergonomically optimised for natural hand movements, the handle's opening angle and blade cutting angle leverage scientific principles to minimise exertion while delivering powerful cuts. Weighing just 0.91kg with balanced force distribution, it significantly reduces muscle soreness during prolonged use, catering to both professional and domestic gardening needs.

【Versatile for Home and Professional Use】Loppers for Gardening Exceptionally adaptable for diverse scenarios including domestic gardening, professional orchard pruning, and landscaping. Effortlessly handles fruit tree trimming, potted plant maintenance, shrub shaping, and hedge trimming. Meets both hobbyists' routine upkeep and professional gardeners' efficiency demands, ensuring year-round garden tidiness and aesthetic appeal.

【Convenient Use and Storage】Featuring a striking orange design for high visibility, it's easily located among tools. Each set includes one telescopic bypass pruner weighing just 0.91kg, requiring minimal storage space and offering effortless portability for gardens, orchards, and similar settings. Waterproof and rust-resistant treatment extends its lifespan while simplifying cleaning and maintenance.
